head_commit.message:
fix(cli): align output_format help text with accepted choices

The help text for calculate/norm_diff -o/--output_format joined
SUPPORTED_FORMATS (json, tabular) while choices= used
AVAILABLE_GEN_FORMATS (csv, json), so following the help with
'-o tabular' returned an argparse invalid-choice error.

Reference the same constant as choices when rendering the help.

Closes #7

Signed-off-by: SAY-5 <say.apm35@gmail.com>

workflow_runs.display_title: fix(cli): align output_format help with accepted choices

head_commit.message:
fix(cli): align output_format help text with accepted choices

The help text for calculate/norm_diff -o/--output_format joined
SUPPORTED_FORMATS (json, tabular) while choices= used
AVAILABLE_GEN_FORMATS (csv, json), so following the help with
'-o tabular' returned an argparse invalid-choice error.

Reference the same constant as choices when rendering the help.

Closes #7

Signed-off-by: SAY-5 <say.apm35@gmail.com>
